description: Lifecycle hooks for dotnet/runtime — AI disclosure guardrails

preToolUse.bash: d=; while IFS= read -r l; do d=$d$l; done; case $d in *github*|*'gh '*) echo 'AI-GENERATED CONTENT DISCLOSURE: When posting content to GitHub under a user account (not a bot/copilot app account), include a visible note (e.g. > [!NOTE]) indicating the content was AI/Copilot-generated. Skip only if the user explicitly asked to omit it.' >&2;; esac; :
preToolUse.powershell: $d = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($d -match 'github|\bgh\b') { [Console]::Error.WriteLine('AI-GENERATED CONTENT DISCLOSURE: When posting content to GitHub under a user account (not a bot/copilot app account), include a visible note (e.g. > [!NOTE]) indicating the content was AI/Copilot-generated. Skip only if the user explicitly asked to omit it.') }
preToolUse.description: Remind about AI disclosure when shell commands interact with GitHub

Skip only if the user explicitly asked to omit it.') }
preToolUse.description: Remind about AI disclosure for write-capable GitHub MCP tools
